item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text:
Use the stress-concentration formula for a plate with a central hole:

\[
\sigma_{\max}=K_t\frac{P}{Wt}, \qquad K_t \approx 3
\]

Nominal stress:

\[
\frac{P}{Wt}=\frac{12\,000}{50\times 5}=48\ \text{MPa}
\]

So,

\[
\sigma_{\max}\approx 3(48)=144\ \text{MPa}
\]

Final answer: **\( \sigma_{\max} \approx 144\ \text{MPa} \)**
